name: wxcode-admin-carbon-devops
title: Carbon DevOps Admin
description: Dark-mode CI/CD operations dashboard — terminal-inspired admin for pipeline runs, deploy frequency, build health, and incident tracking. Original archetype built for DevOps and platform engineering teams.

query.en: Build me a dark-mode DevOps admin dashboard for CI/CD pipelines — top navbar with repo/env switcher, left icon rail, KPI tiles for deploys and build health, pipeline board with stage chips, deploy frequency chart, builds table, and incident panel.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a dark-mode DevOps admin dashboard for CI/CD pipelines — top navbar with repo/env switcher, left icon rail, KPI tiles for deploys and build health, pipeline board with stage chips, deploy frequency chart, builds table, and incident panel.

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
